prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which assumes that the logarithm of daily returns follows a normal distribution. Historical daily volatility (standard deviation of daily log returns) and drift (mean daily log return) for MCD were estimated using past trading data (e.g., approximately the last year of daily returns). For this prediction, an estimated daily volatility of 0.9% and a small positive daily drift were used. The point estimate incorporates this historical drift, while the confidence intervals are constructed by applying standard Z-scores corresponding to each confidence level to the current price, scaled by the estimated daily volatility.
